summary: A phone interview on The Glenn Beck Program with Acting ICE Director Todd Lyons calling Gov. Newsom's anti-ICE comments 'disgusting' and 'totally wrong,' with a brief Colbert/Newsom Late Show clip referenced. It is a talk-show interview, not a produced music-driven montage.
notable_text: THE GLENN BECK PROGRAM; 'On the Phone — Todd Lyons'; 'The Late Show with Stephen Colbert | CBS'
